name: Lake Superior Acquisition Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are a blank check company, incorporated as a BVI business company whose business purpose is to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We are an emerging growth company and, as such, are subject to all the risks associated with emerging growth companies.
